title: Fundamental Rights (Basic Awareness)
rights: Right to Equality: Protection against discrimination on grounds of religion, race, caste, sex or place of birth (Article 15)
Right to Freedom of Speech and Expression (Article 19)
Protection of Life and Personal Liberty (Article 21) - No person shall be deprived of life or personal liberty except according to procedure established by law
avoid: Do not use Freedom of Speech to incite violence or disturb public order
Do not assume rights are absolute (they are subject to reasonable restrictions by the State)
